{{ $icons := dict "caution" (resources.Get "images/stop-16.svg") "important" (resources.Get "images/report-16.svg") "note" (resources.Get "images/info-16.svg") "tip" (resources.Get "images/light-bulb-16.svg") "warning" (resources.Get "images/alert-16.svg") }} {{ if eq .Type "alert" }}

{{ with index $icons .AlertType }} {{ .Content | safeHTML }} {{ end }} {{ with .AlertTitle }} {{ . }} {{ else }} {{ or (i18n .AlertType) (title .AlertType) }} {{ end }} {{ if .AlertSign }} {{ .AlertSign }} {{ end }}

{{ .Text }}
{{ else }}
{{ .Text }}
{{ end }}
